briefdescription.para: This function is used to send eFuses write request to library.

detaileddescription.para: There are individual structures for each set of eFuses in the library and one global structure which holds the pointer to the individual structures to be written. XNvm_EfuseDataAddr is a global structure and members of this structure will be filled with the addresses of the individual structures to be written to eFuse. typedef struct { u64 EnvMonDisFlag; u64 AesKeyAddr; u64 PpkHashAddr; u64 DecOnlyAddr; u64 SecCtrlAddr; u64 MiscCtrlAddr; u64 RevokeIdAddr; u64 IvAddr; u64 UserFuseAddr; u64 GlitchCfgAddr; u64 BootEnvCtrlAddr; u64 Misc1CtrlAddr; u64 OffChipIdAddr; } XNvm_EfuseDataAddr;
Example : IvAddr holds memory address where IVs to be written are stored. If there is no request to write IVs then IvAddr in XNvm_EfuseDataAddr will be NULL.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the write is successful

briefdescription.para: This function reads all eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If all the read requests are successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads DNA eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Ppk Hash eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads IV eFuses data and displays.

parameterdescription.para: IvType MetaHeader IV or Blk IV or Plm IV or Data partition IV

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Revocation ID eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads OffChip ID eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads DecOnly eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads User eFuses data and displays.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read request is successful.

briefdescription.para: This API reads secure and control bits from efuse cache and displays here.
This API reads secure and control bits from efuse cache and displays here.
This API reads Puf control bits from efuse cache and displays here.
This API reads Misc control bits from efuse cache and displays here.
This API reads Security Misc1 control bits from efuse cache and displays.
This API reads Boot Environmental control bits from efuse cache and displays.
This function is used to initialize the XNvm_EfuseSecCtrlBits structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program SECURITY_CONTROL eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 AesDis; u8 JtagErrOutDis; u8 JtagDis; u8 HwTstBitsDis; u8 Ppk0WrLk; u8 Ppk1WrLk; u8 Ppk2WrLk; u8 AesCrcLk; u8 AesWrLk; u8 UserKey0CrcLk; u8 UserKey0WrLk; u8 UserKey1CrcLk; u8 UserKey1WrLk; u8 SecDbgDis; u8 SecLockDbgDis; u8 PmcScEn; u8 BootEnvWrLk; u8 RegInitDis; } XNvm_EfuseSecCtrlBits;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization of XNvm_EfuseSecCtrlBits structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseMiscCtrlBits structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program PPK INVLD eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 GlitchDetHaltBootEn; u8 GlitchDetRomMonitorEn; u8 HaltBootError; u8 HaltBootEnv; u8 CryptoKatEn; u8 LbistEn; u8 SafetyMissionEn; u8 Ppk0Invalid; u8 Ppk1Invalid; u8 Ppk2Invalid; }XNvm_EfuseMiscCtrlBits;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization XNvm_EfuseMiscCtrlBits structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseRevokeIds structure with user provided data and assign it to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program revocation ID eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmRevokeId; u32 RevokeId[XNVM_NUM_OF_REVOKE_ID_FUSES]; }XNvm_EfuseRevokeIds;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization of XNvm_EfuseRevokeIds structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseIvs structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program IV eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmMetaHeaderIv; u8 PrgmBlkObfusIv; u8 PrgmPlmIv; u8 PrgmDataPartitionIv; u32 MetaHeaderIv[XNVM_EFUSE_IV_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 BlkObfusIv[XNVM_EFUSE_IV_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 PlmIv[XNVM_EFUSE_IV_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 DataPartitionIv[XNVM_EFUSE_IV_LEN_IN_WORDS]; }XNvm_EfuseIvs;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization of XNvm_EfuseIvs structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize Glitch config structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program below eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmGlitch; u8 GlitchDetWrLk; u32 GlitchDetTrim; u8 GdRomMonitorEn; u8 GdHaltBootEn; }XNvm_EfuseGlitchCfgBits;

inbodydescription.para: Config data size is 31 bits Bit[30:0]

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseAesKeys structure with user provided data and assign it to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program below eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmAesKey; u8 PrgmUserKey0; u8 PrgmUserKey1; u32 AesKey[XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 UserKey0[XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 UserKey1[XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY_LEN_IN_WORDS]; }XNvm_EfuseAesKeys;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If initialization of XNvm_EfuseAesKeys structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the XNvm_EfusePpkHash structure with user provided data and assign it to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program PPK0/PPK1/PPK2 hash eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmPpk0Hash; u8 PrgmPpk1Hash; u8 PrgmPpk2Hash; u32 Ppk0Hash[XNVM_EFUSE_PPK_HASH_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 Ppk1Hash[XNVM_EFUSE_PPK_HASH_LEN_IN_WORDS]; u32 Ppk2Hash[XNVM_EFUSE_PPK_HASH_LEN_IN_WORDS]; }XNvm_EfusePpkHash;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If initialization of XNvm_EfusePpkHash structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the XNvm_EfuseDecOnly structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program DEC_ONLY eFuses.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If initialization of XNvm_EfuseDecOnly structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_UserEfuseData structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program User Fuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u32 StartUserFuseNum; u32 NumOfUserFuses; u64 UserFuseDataAddr; }XNvm_EfuseUserDataAddr;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization of XNvm_UserEfuseData structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is to validate the input User Fuse string.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On valid input UserFuse string
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseOffChipIds structure with user provided data and assign it to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program OffChip_Revoke ID eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmOffchipId; u32 OffChipId[XNVM_NUM_OF_OFFCHIP_ID_FUSES]; }XNvm_EfuseOffChipIds;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization of XNvm_EfuseOffChipIds structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseBootEnvCtrlBits structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program XNvm_EfuseBootEnvCtrlBits eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 PrgmSysmonTempHot; u8 PrgmSysmonVoltPmc; u8 PrgmSysmonVoltPslp; u8 PrgmSysmonVoltSoc; u8 PrgmSysmonTempCold; u8 SysmonTempEn; u8 SysmonVoltEn; u8 SysmonTempHot; u8 SysmonVoltPmc; u8 SysmonVoltPslp; u8 SysmonVoltSoc; u8 SysmonTempCold; }XNvm_EfuseBootEnvCtrlBits;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization XNvm_EfuseBootEnvCtrlBits structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize XNvm_EfuseSecMisc1Bits structure with user provided data and assign the same to global structure XNvm_EfuseDataAddr to program XNvm_EfuseSecMisc1Bits eFuses.

detaileddescription.para: typedef struct { u8 LpdMbistEn; u8 PmcMbistEn; u8 LpdNocScEn; u8 SysmonVoltMonEn; u8 SysmonTempMonEn; }XNvm_EfuseSecMisc1Bits;

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization XNvm_EfuseSecMisc1Bits structure is successful

briefdescription.para: This function is to validate and convert Aes key string to Hex.

parameterdescription.para: Destination where converted Aes key can be stored
Length of the Aes key in bits

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If validation and conversion of key is success

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *IvStr, u8 *Dst, u32 Len, XNvm_IvType IvType)
memberdef.name: XilNvm_PrepareIvForWrite

briefdescription.para: This function is to validate and convert IV string to Hex.

parameterdescription.para: Destination to store the converted IV in Hex
Length of the IV in bits
XNVM_EFUSE_META_HEADER_IV_RANGE or XNVM_EFUSE_BLACK_IV or XNVM_EFUSE_PLM_IV_RANGE or XNVM_EFUSE_DATA_PARTITION_IV_RANGE

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If validation and conversion of IV success

briefdescription.para: Validate the input string contains valid IV String.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On valid input IV string XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string

briefdescription.para: This function is used to validate the input string contains valid PPK hash.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On valid input Ppk Hash string
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string
XST_FAILURE - On non hexadecimal character in string

briefdescription.para: This function reverses the data array.

parameterdescription.para: - Length of the data in bytes

briefdescription.para: This function is validate the input string contains valid Revoke Id String.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to Revocation ID/OffChip_Revoke ID String
Destination to store the converted Revocation ID/ OffChip ID in Hex
Length of the Revocation ID/OffChip ID in bits

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On valid input Revoke Id string
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string

briefdescription.para: Validate the input string contains valid AES key.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input AES key string.
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string.
XST_FAILURE - On non hexadecimal character in string

briefdescription.para: Adds the SLR Index.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to instance XNvm_ClientInstance

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input SlrIndex.
XST_FAILURE - On non valid input SlrIndex

memberdef.name: XNVM_SHARED_BUF_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: (Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseIvs)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseDataAddr)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseGlitchCfgBits)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseAesKeys)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfusePpkHash)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseDecOnly)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseMiscCtrlBits)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseSecCtrlBits)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseRevokeIds)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseBootEnvCtrlBits)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseSecMisc1Bits)) + Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseUserDataAddr)) + \ Align(sizeof(XNvm_EfuseOffChipIds)) + \ XNVM_USER_FUSES_MAX_SIZE_IN_BYTES)

briefdescription.para: Max SLR number.

memberdef.name: DEFINE_CHAR_ARR
memberdef.initializer: static const char _Arrname[XNVM_MAX_SLRS][Size + 1U] \ __attribute__((aligned(64U)))__attribute__((section(".data.XNVM_U8"))) = { \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_0_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_1_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_2_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_3_##Param \ };

memberdef.name: DEFINE_CHAR_POINTER_ARR
memberdef.initializer: static const char *_Arrname[XNVM_MAX_SLRS] \ __attribute__((aligned(64U)))__attribute__((section(".data.XNVM_U8_POINTER"))) = { \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_0_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_1_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_2_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_3_##Param \ };

memberdef.name: DEFINE_U8_VAL
memberdef.initializer: static const u8 _Arrname[XNVM_MAX_SLRS] \ __attribute__((aligned(64U)))__attribute__((section(".data.XNVM_U8"))) = { \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_0_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_1_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_2_##Param, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_3_##Param \ };

memberdef.name: DEFINE_FLAG_ARR
memberdef.initializer: static const u8 _Arrname[XNVM_MAX_SLRS] \ __attribute__((aligned(64U)))__attribute__((section(".data.XNVM_FLAG"))) = { \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_0_##FLAG, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_1_##FLAG, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_2_##FLAG, \ XNVM_EFUSE_SLR_3_##FLAG \ };

briefdescription.para: This file illustrates Basic eFuse read/write using rows on Primary SLR0, Secondary SLR1, Secondary SLR2 and Secondary SLR3.

detaileddescription.para: To build this application, xilmailbox library must be included in BSP and xilnvm library must be in client mode.
This example is supported for Versal SSIT devices.

para.heading: Procedure to link and compile the example for the default ddr less designs

detaileddescription.para: The default linker settings places a software stack, heap and data in DDR memory. For this example to work, any data shared between client running on A72/R5/PL and server running on PMC, should be placed in area which is accessible to both client and server.
To keep things simple, by default the cache is disabled for this example

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.5 hj 02/05/2025 First release 3.5 hj 14/04/2025 Added support for unique PPK hash programming for each SLR 3.6 hj 18/06/2025 Added support to program unique value of efuse for each SLR
